author: anon-59ff128d
content: Delivered: (1) Created crates/ripsed/ facade crate with re-exports + apply_to_file()/apply_to_files() high-level API that does locked read-modify-write. (2) Removed locking from write_atomic and AtomicBatch::commit — they are now pure write primitives. (3) Added per-file FileLock in file_mode, json_mode, and script_mode CLI callers — lock acquired before read, held through backup+write. (4) JSON and script modes use a HashMap<PathBuf, FileLock> to hold locks across multiple operations on the same file. 524 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.
